lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.12]Round the fire, clap along!
[00:02.08]Round the fire, sing this song!
[00:04.00]Marshmallow, marshmallow, twist and turn,
[00:08.36]Round the fire while the embers burn!
[00:11.74]Round the fire, clap along!
[00:13.66]Round the fire, sing this song!
[00:19.44]Friends on the left, friends on the right,
[00:23.84]Round the fire on a Stingray night!
[00:27.24]Round-the-fire, clap-clap-CLAP!
[00:29.16]Round-the-fire, clap-clap-CLAP!
